overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit urban corridor in Night City. The player character walks from an outdoor elevated walkway past holographic advertisements, through a covered arcade with cyan neon frames and digital billboards, arriving at an NCART metro station entrance.

events.description: moving from open balcony area toward covered walkway section
turning right to enter the covered commercial walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along an elevated outdoor walkway overlooking the neon-lit cityscape and skyscrapers

entered.detail: large red billboard with woman and dog imagery and german text
tall futuristic buildings with illuminated windows and neon accents

metal safety railing along the elevated walkway edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated outdoor walkway at night, overlooking the sprawling neon-lit skyline of Night City. The camera moves past a prominent red billboard and tropical plants, turning right to enter a covered commercial area.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with neon framing

events.description: entering the fully covered corridor with cyan neon structural frames
shifting from mixed outdoor ambient to full artificial neon illumination

agents.ego_description: proceeding through the covered walkway passing commercial signs and neon-lit doorways

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: glowing cyan rectangular frames marking corridor sections
illuminated commercial sign for data security services
glowing rectangular light fixtures on the corridor ceiling

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a covered commercial walkway defined by repeating cyan neon doorframes and reflective tiled floors. The player passes the 'DRESDE DATA' security sign and moves deeper into the corridor as the city skyline fades from view.

scene_state.functional_zone: indoor commercial corridor with digital advertising

events.description: passing by seated NPCs on corridor benches near vending machines
slight course adjustment while continuing down the long corridor

agents.ego_description: walking down the long corridor past digital billboards and pedestrians seated on benches

notable_agents.action: two people sitting on a bench engaged in conversation

entered.detail: large illuminated screens displaying commercial advertisements on corridor walls
metal seating along the walkway for pedestrians
red and black automated vending units against the wall
continuous glowing light strips running the length of the corridor ceiling

segments.scene_description: The player proceeds through the enclosed corridor lined with digital advertising screens and glowing ceiling panels. Several NPCs are seated on benches along the right wall near red vending machines, while the repeating cyan neon frames continue to mark the passage deeper into the complex.

events.description: approaching the NCART metro station entrance with distinctive green and yellow signage
slowing down as approaching the station entrance doors

agents.ego_description: approaching the NCART metro station entrance at the end of the corridor

entered.detail: metro station entrance with green glass doors and illuminated signage
large illuminated sign reading 'NCART Night City Area Rapid Transit'
purple illuminated warning signs above the station doors
transparent green-tinted entrance doors to the station

segments.scene_description: The corridor opens toward the NCART station entrance, marked by prominent green and yellow signage. The player slows while approaching the green glass doors, with warning signs visible above the entrance and the corridor's neon frames now appearing at the periphery.

events.description: interacting with the NCART terminal interface which displays the metro map

agents.ego_description: interacting with the NCART station terminal to access the metro system map

entered.detail: interactive terminal screen displaying the metro system map

segments.scene_description: The player arrives at the NCART station entrance and interacts with the terminal, bringing up the metro map interface. The surrounding corridor elements fade from view as the focus centers on the station's green glass entrance and the interactive display.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from an open, neon-lit elevated walkway into the enclosed, sterile depths of a futuristic transit hub. It begins outdoors overlooking the sprawling Night City skyline, moving past a red billboard and tropical greenery before turning right to enter a covered commercial area. As the city skyline fades from view, the environment shifts into a corridor of reflective tiled floors and repeating cyan neon doorframes, passing a security sign and digital advertising screens. The camera then proceeds deeper into the complex past seated NPCs and red vending machines, eventually opening toward the green and yellow signage of the NCART station entrance. Finally, the movement slows as the player approaches the green glass doors and interacts with a terminal, shifting the focus from the neon corridor to the interactive metro map interface.
